name: ChkCreate_AllNodesDead, ChkStart_AllNodesDead
title: ChkCreate_AllNodesDead, ChkStart_AllNodesDead
description: All monitored nodes must send at least one of their Tx messages within a specified interval. Otherwise an event will be triggered.
Each node is checked separately, so a dead node is recognized even if others are alive.
Gateway nodes require that the bus context corresponds to the network that is being observed.
For FlexRay only valid data frames and PDUs are recognized as communication, Null Frames and Erroneous frames are ignored.

parameters.name: aMaxQuietTime
parameters.description: Upper limit of time interval. > 0; default unit [ms], if not changed with ChkConfig_SetPrecision.

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set.In test modules this parameter is optional.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
